title: H7X Ricron Turtle Digger
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Turtle_digger.jpg|thumb|250px|The H7X Ricron Turtle Digger on [[Ruul (planet)|Ruul]].]]

The '''H7X Ricron Turtle Digger''' was a mining vehicle used on the strip-mined planet of [[Ruul (planet)|Ruul]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It traveled on two wide tracks and appears to have carried a laser drill on its undercarriage.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''
